// WARN: This file is auto generated by flood-tide-gen
match CmdOp::from(nv.opt.num) {
    CmdOp::Append => {
        conf.opt_append.push(value_to_type::<String>(nv)?);
    }
    CmdOp::Help => {
        conf.flg_help = true;
    }
    CmdOp::Version => {
        conf.flg_version = true;
    }
    CmdOp::UcX => {
        conf.opt_uc_x.push(value_to_type::<OptUcXParam>(nv)?);
    }
}
